# Missoula.business

> AI-powered automation and custom software for small businesses in Missoula, Montana. We build AI workflows that save local businesses 10-20 hours per week.

## About

Missoula.business is operated by J Scott Chapman, founder of Ravenview Services, a Missoula-based technology consulting firm with over ten years of experience. The mission is simple: help machines do machine work so humans can do human work.

We help local businesses leverage artificial intelligence and automation to eliminate busy work, replace manual processes, and gain a competitive edge — so they can focus on what their business actually does.

## Services

- Marketing Automation: AI-powered content calendars, social media posts, email campaigns, and ad copy — all in your brand voice. Clients go from 5+ hours/week on marketing to 30 minutes.
- AI Customer Agents: Custom AI agents that handle inquiries, qualify leads, book appointments, and follow up — 24/7, no hiring required.
- Competitor Intelligence: Automated tracking of competitor pricing, ads, reviews, and market moves. Weekly reports delivered to your inbox.
- Operations Automation: Scheduling, invoicing, data entry, document processing, inventory — automate the repetitive tasks that eat your day.
- Website & SEO: Fast, professional websites optimized for search engines, AI assistants, and local customers.
- Custom Software Development: Building tailored applications when off-the-shelf solutions fall short — from dashboards to full platforms.

## Free SEO Audit

Enter your website URL at missoula.business and get an instant AI-powered SEO, GEO (Generative Engine Optimization), and AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) audit emailed to you. We analyze your meta tags, structured data, content, local SEO, social readiness, AI/LLM readiness, mobile performance, and E-E-A-T signals.

## Industries Served

- Restaurants & Hospitality: Automated review responses, reservation follow-ups, social media content, customer loyalty
- Contractors & Trades: Automated estimate follow-ups, job scheduling, invoice generation, review requests
- Professional Services: Client intake automation, document processing, appointment scheduling, reporting
- Retail & E-Commerce: Inventory alerts, product descriptions, email marketing, social showcases
- Healthcare & Wellness: Patient intake, appointment reminders, follow-up care, HIPAA-conscious workflows
- Outdoor & Recreation: Booking automation, weather-triggered marketing, guide scheduling

## Pricing

- Quick Wins ($500-$2,000): Single automations — social media posting, email follow-ups, booking automation, chatbot setup
- Growth Engine ($2,000-$5,000): Connected workflows — full marketing pipeline, custom AI agent, competitor dashboard, CRM integration, website + SEO
- Custom Platform ($5,000+): Full-stack software — AI agent orchestration, multi-system integration, payment processing, real-time dashboards

## Case Study: Automated SMS Platform

An automotive training company was struggling with student engagement between assessments. We built an AI-powered SMS platform that analyzed each student's scores, identified weak areas, and sent personalized daily training links — fully automated.

Results: 2x engagement, 98% delivery rate, 10 hours saved weekly, concept to launch in 2 weeks.

> "Scott has a rare ability to bridge the gap between an idea and the final product. His contributions were instrumental to the success of our program." — Lowell Greene, TechFix / ATG

## Case Study: AI Agent Orchestration Platform

Built an agentic AI platform for hospitality where a single user input triggers a chain of AI-orchestrated actions: restaurant search, budget framing, note composition, Stripe virtual card issuance, and real-time restaurant notification. 5 integrated APIs, under 30 seconds end-to-end, zero manual steps, built in 8 days.

## Approach

1. Free call (15 min) — Tell us what's eating your time
2. Workflow audit — We map processes and show where tech saves hours, with projected ROI
3. Build & deploy — Working results within the first week
4. Measure & optimize — Track time saved, leads captured, revenue gained

## FAQ

Q: How can AI help my small business in Missoula?
A: AI can automate repetitive tasks like scheduling, invoicing, follow-ups, and social media posting — saving 10-20 hours per week. It can also draft marketing content, respond to customer inquiries 24/7, analyze competitors, and generate leads.

Q: What does it cost?
A: Quick automations start at $500-2,000. Full workflow builds run $2,000-5,000. Custom platforms are $5,000+. Every engagement starts with a free conversation. ROI within the first month.

Q: Do I need to understand AI?
A: No. We start by understanding your business, not explaining technology. You tell us what's costing you time; we handle everything else.

Q: How long does a project take?
A: Simple automations ship in 3-5 days. Larger builds take 2-6 weeks. Working results within the first week.

Q: Can you automate my social media and marketing?
A: Yes. We set up AI-powered content pipelines that draft social posts, schedule them across platforms, write email campaigns, and track performance. Most clients go from 5+ hours/week to under 30 minutes.
